full_text:
Wang Si 王思
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Si (王思)was born in Jiyin. Admired for character with a wide circle of friends, became a Minister. Wang Si was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
